name: Maruti Suzuki Ertiga
description: A spacious 7-seater car ideal for family trips and group travel. Provides a comfortable ride, good mileage, and enough luggage space for long journeys.

name: Renault Duster
description: A powerful SUV designed for long-distance travel and rough roads. Offers high ground clearance, strong performance, and a comfortable ride for road trips.

name: Toyota Innova
description: A premium 7-seater vehicle known for comfort and reliability. Perfect for long journeys, airport transfers, and family trips with smooth and spacious seating.

name: Honda Amaze
description: A comfortable and stylish sedan, perfect for city rides and long-distance travel. Offers smooth driving, spacious seating, and great fuel efficiency for a relaxed journey.

name: Maruti Suzuki Eeco
description: A practical and economical 5 to 7-seater van suitable for group travel and local rides. Ideal for budget trips with decent space and simple comfort.
